sections.paragraph: <entryFree id="n41388" key="e)pitolmhto/s" type="main" opt="n" TEIform="entryFree"> <orth extent="suff" lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="orth">ἐπιτολμ-ητός</orth>, <itype lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="itype">όν</itype>, <sense id="n41388.0" n="A" level="1" opt="n" TEIform="sense"> <tr_ opt="n" TEIform="tr">to be ventured,</tr_> <bibl n="urn:cts:greekLit:tlg0563.tlg001:24:4" default="NO" TEIform="bibl"> <author TEIform="author">Max.Tyr.</author> <biblScope TEIform="biblScope">24.4</biblScope> </bibl> (<xr opt="n" TEIform="xr"> <lbl opt="n" TEIform="lbl">v.l.</lbl> <ref targOrder="U" lang="greek" TEIform="ref">-ητέον</ref> </xr>).</sense> </entryFree>
